arts.ttl: Acorns to adorn Villa shirts against Young Boys
arts.sum: Aston Villa is delighted to announce that Acorns will adorn the front of the players’ shirts in tonight’s Champions League opener against Young Boys. Principal Partners, Betano, have kindly donated the space back to Aston Villa and the club have, in turn, donated the space to Acorns. The club’s long-standing relationship with the hospice goes back to 2008 when they were a permanent fixture on the shirts. Chris Heck, President of Business Operations at Aston Villa, said: “We are delighted that Betano came to us to offer up the opportunity and ask who are the best beneficiaries of the space. “It was an absolute no-brainer to bring Acorns back onto the front of shirt, an organisation close to the hearts of everyone involved with Aston Villa.” Julio Iglesias, Chief Commercial Officer of Kaizen Gaming, added: “With all partnerships, CSR is a major part of the conversation from the beginning in terms of how we give back. “As part of that, to walk the walk, we have a first step to help Aston Villa; donating the space on the shirt for the first Champions League game to an organisation close to Aston Villa’s hearts.” Vicki Rowles, Director of Fundraising at Acorns Children’s Hospice, said: “We are extremely honoured to have our logo featured on Aston Villa’s shirts for their UEFA Champions League debut against Young Boys. “Help can’t wait for the children and families who desperately need us. Thanks to the support of Aston Villa and the global exposure of the Champions League, we can reach even more families in need. “We’re truly grateful to our friends at Aston Villa for their continued dedication to Acorns. We wish the team the very best of luck for tonight’s game.”

arts.ttl: I lifted the European Cup thanks to 'humble' Aston Villa hero Gary Shaw
arts.sum: As Aston Villa prepare for their first foray back into Europe's elite competition since the days of Gary Shaw - the only Birmingham born player to feature in claret and blue against Bayern Munich in the final in 1982 - the club are mourning the tragic loss of one of their European Cup heroes at the age of just 63. Gary and Patrick Whelan were neighbours in Castle Bromwich and, despite the 15-year age gap, they became friends.

arts.ttl: 'Brilliant': Alan Shearer incredibly impressed by £13m player who Aston Villa got rid of this summer
Gary Shaw’s name rings out in Bern bar as Aston Villa legend leads special tribute before Champions League tie
arts.sum: Former Aston Villa player Ian Taylor has been filmed leading a chant for legend Gary Shaw in a bar in Bern ahead of the club’s Champions League bow. Widely regarded as one of the best Villa forwards in the club’s 150-year history, Shaw made 213 appearances and scored 79 goals in claret and blue.

arts.ttl: John McGinn opens up on Unai Emery talks that left him questioning Aston Villa future
arts.sum: John McGinn feared for his future at Aston Villa after Unai Emery was appointed in 2022 but now the Scotland international will lead his side into the Champions League

arts.ttl: Villa are back among the European elite - and Emery wants to be a 'protagonist'
arts.sum: Villa will have to tap into the spirit of ‘82 to go far in this season’s competition as they’ll play as many games in the league phase as the club’s heroes from 42 years ago did to progress to the final. Villa crawled over the line to secure Champions League football as they failed to win any of their last six games of last season in all competitions.

arts.ttl: Young Boys vs Aston Villa: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Aston Villa make their first Champions League appearance since the competition's rebranding when they travel to Switzerland to face Young Boys on Tuesday. This is the first competitive fixture between Young Boys and Aston Villa.

Fixtures Young Boys Vs. Aston Villa - Tue, Sep 17th 2024, 18:45 Aston Villa trained at Stadion Wankdorf on Monday evening in preparation for their UEFA Champions League tie against BSC Young Boys. Unai Emery, his coaches and players took to the artificial pitch in Bern to go through their paces ahead of matchday one. Villa face the Swiss outfit for the first time in a competitive fixture, aiming to get off to a positive start in Europe’s elite club competition. You can view a gallery of training images below…

arts.ttl: 'Never shows up': National media now criticise £42m player for display on full debut after leaving Aston Villa
Youri Tielemans sends 'make our mark' message after revealing what Unai Emery told him in transfer talks
arts.sum: The Belgian has enjoyed an excellent start to the campaign and has played every minute of Villa's first four Premier League games so far. Youri Tielemans was in attendance at Aston Villa's pre-match press conference ahead of the Champions League clash against Young Boys on Tuesday night (5:45pm kick-off).
